creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mat
Date: Mon Sep 10 13:15:13 UTC 2018
New revision: 479406
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/479406

Log:
  Add DOCS options to ports that should have one.

  Also various fixes related to said option.

  Submitted by:	mat
  exp-runs by:	antoine
